headlines.description: Mohamed Salah scored twice to lift Liverpool to a 2-0 Premier League victory over 10-man Everton in Saturday's Merseyside derby at Anfield.
headlines.shortLinkText: Salah brace sees Liverpool beat 10-man Everton

headlines.description: Bournemouth remain winless in the Premier League after Wolves beat his former club 2-1 with a late winner from Sasa Kalajdzic  on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bournemouth remain winless after 2-1 loss to Wolves

headlines.description: Brentford beat 10-man Burnley 3-0 with  Wissa and  Mbeumo back on target to give the West Londoners a first home win of the season
headlines.shortLinkText: Brentford beat Burnley 3-0 to end losing streak

events.name: Brighton & Hove Albion at Manchester City

headlines.description: Manchester City got back to winning ways with a 2-1 win over Brighton on Saturday thanks to goals by Julian Alvarez and Erling Haaland.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland nets as Man City edge past Brighton

headlines.description: Newcastle United winger Jacob Murphy scored and made two more as they secured a 4-0 win over Crystal Palace at St. James' Park on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Murphy stars as Newcastle hit four past Palace

headlines.description: A late comeback saw Elijah Adebayo score a stoppage-time goal to earn Luton Town a 2-2 draw at Nottingham Forest in the Premier League on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late Adebayo goal earns Luton point at Forest

headlines.description: Arsenal fought back from two goals down to earn a 2-2 draw and preserve their unbeaten start to the Premier League season on Saturday, with late goals from Declan Rice and Leandro Trossard.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal stun Chelsea to rescue dramatic draw

headlines.description: Scott McTominay scored his third goal in two games and Diogo Dalot netted the winner in Manchester United's 2-1 Premier League victory at Sheffield United on Saturday to secure their first back to back wins of the season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dalot stunner gives Man Utd win over Sheff Utd
